name: Pot O' Gold
description: A Bandit booster shield that occasionally creates tiny cash pickups when you take damage. Those pickups are collected instantly, which gives it a mild money-generation gimmick, but its defensive value is usually outclassed by other rare shields at the same level.
notes:
At higher levels, the amount of money it generates is usually too small to matter. Cash created by its booster effect does not count toward the Dolla Dolla Bills Y'all challenge.

Despite functioning like a blue booster shield, it uses the appearance of a purple maylay shield.

special.description: When you take damage, it can generate a small cash pickup that is collected immediately. That effect does not restore shield capacity.
special.title: Blarney, I say! 'Tis blarney!
